title: [PREVIEW ONLY] Shinkansen E5 for Minecraft Transit Railway
description: An E5 shinkansen for MTR mod in Minecraft with all 10 coaches.
body:
E5 shinkansen for MTR mod from minecraft. Has all 10 coaches in E5 livery and includes the major 4 types of coahces (driving trailer, pantograph, passenger and a passenger coach with less windows). This model was made in blockbench.

The Shinkansen E5 series is a Japanese high-speed train operated by JR East on the Tōhoku Shinkansen and Hokkaido Shinkansen lines, capable of speeds up to 320 km/h (200 mph). Introduced in 2011, it offers advanced passenger comfort, including women's-only spaces, universal design, and a luxurious "Gran Class" seating option, and features a sleek, aerodynamic design.
